issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for missing environment variables or network failures.
The skill assumes a React/Next.js environment and uses specific environment variables, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: embed-feedback-widget
scenarios.rationale: Response A includes the required data attributes and exact Tailwind classes, while Response B lacks the data attributes and uses different styling.

scenarios.name: create-feature-request-api
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A uses different endpoints and headers, missing the required calls.
